title: notifications core — compliance evidence
description: Core carries the aggregate compliance contract; channel modules produce channel-specific evidence (CAN-SPAM footer + one-click List-Unsubscribe from notifications-mail, TCPA STOP handling from notifications-sms, COPPA VPC gate from notifications-push). This file names the article-level obligations that resolve to core-owned surfaces (consent registry, preference storage, unsubscribe endpoint, retention rules, DSAR aggregation).

controls.evidence: retention.json defines every entity's window + purge job. ExpungeArchivedNotificationsJob enforces daily.
Every category declares its consent_tier in notifications.json. `transactional_required` = Art. 6(1)(b) contract; `product_default` + `marketing_opt_in` = Art. 6(1)(a) consent.

PreferenceUpdated event emits with source= (user_settings, unsubscribe_link, admin_override, seed). Every consent change audit-logged via HasAuditable. Unsubscribe honoured immediately (see routes.json central-unsubscribe).

NotificationDispatched payload includes recipient.consent_age_gate (adult / minor_over_consent_age / minor_under_consent_age). Marketing + product priority notifications hard-suppressed for `minor_under_consent_age` until parental consent captured by compliance module.
Notification + NotificationPreference expose Exportable trait. Compliance module's DSAR orchestrator aggregates across modules.
UserErased event triggers PurgePreferencesForErasedUser listener (hard delete). Notification rows anonymised per audit_log tier rule.
NotificationPreference Exportable produces JSON. Consumer can re-import via Importable trait.
Every marketing-tier category has opt_out_allowed=true; PreferenceResolver suppresses future dispatches within seconds of PreferenceUpdated.
N/A — notifications does not make solely-automated decisions with significant effect. Digest batching + preference resolution are deterministic + user-controlled.
Marketing categories require opt-in by default (never on unless user explicitly enables). Quiet hours default on-per-user-timezone. Digest defaults reduce email volume.
audit_log rows retained 7y cold (see retention.json). notifications.preferences.adminView permission enables DPO to query.
addressee_email + addressee_phone are `confidential` tier (see data-classes.json) — AES-256 at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit.
Same evidence as GDPR.
retention.json's minor-aware overlay reduces Notification hot window for minor recipients to 14d per compliance-module rule.
recipient.consent_age_gate blocks non-transactional-required sends to minor_under_consent_age until VPC captured. Enforced in DispatchGateway.
Marketing-priority categories are opt-in for California residents; the Do-Not-Sell-Or-Share global toggle propagates via PreferenceResolver.

controls.principle: Do Not Sell or Share toggle
controls.evidence: Compliance module exposes the toggle; PreferenceResolver reads it into every dispatch's channel resolution.
Every SDUI screen in notifications validated in CI against the HeroUI a11y contrast rules. Email templates rendered by React Email pass Litmus contrast checks.
Every mail template uses descriptive link text via shared Button component. Never 'click here'.
SDUI screens compose HeroUI Pro components with built-in focus rings.
React Email Layout component sets `<html lang>` from recipient.locale; every SDUI screen sets `dir=ltr|rtl` via LocaleProvider.
HeroUI Pro components ship ARIA labels by construction.
health.json + metrics.json + broadcasts.json admin channel. Alerts on deliveries-oldest-pending-age fail threshold.
feature-flags.json kill switches allow ops to pause dispatch / disable digest / disable in-app-broadcast during incidents. Every kill-switch flip audit-logged with actor + timestamp.
NotificationTemplate versions retained 7y cold; TemplatePublished audit rows document actor + version + timestamp. Template audit surfaces on the compliance DPO dashboard.
policies.json enforces per-model per-action authorization. platform_admin surface strictly separated from tenant surface.
confidential-tier fields encrypted at rest via foundation's HasAuditable KMS integration.

channel_evidence_delegates.can_spam: notifications-mail (CAN-SPAM §7704(a)(1-4) evidence: postal address footer, functional return address, one-click unsubscribe honoured 10d)
channel_evidence_delegates.coppa_vpc_capture: compliance module (captures VPC); notifications core enforces the gate via recipient.consent_age_gate
